---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for MarkFlow
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## 功能描述 | Feature Description

描述你希望添加的功能 / Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## 使用场景 | Use Case

这个功能解决什么问题？/ What problem does this feature solve?

## 建议的实现方式 | Suggested Implementation

如果有实现思路，请描述 / If you have ideas for implementation, describe them.

## 替代方案 | Alternatives Considered

你考虑过的替代方案 / Alternative solutions you've considered.

## 附加信息 | Additional Context

其他相关信息 / Any other context.
